name: communication-briefing-connector
description: Local Codex connector for daily communication briefings across email, LinkedIn exports/API, and WhatsApp exports/webhooks.

interface.shortDescription: Builds daily briefings from email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and calendar-worthy signals.
interface.longDescription: A local connector and MCP server for generating morning and evening communication briefings. Gmail is handled by Codex app tools, while LinkedIn and WhatsApp are supported through legitimate export, webhook, or approved API paths.
defaultPrompt: Check connector status for LinkedIn and WhatsApp.
